Stokes Drift
============

Stokes-drift profiles for Langmuir turbulence parameterisations.
Multiple source options are supported: constant, exponential, file-based,
or theoretical wave spectra (Li et al., 2017).  Langmuir numbers
:math:`La_{\rm Turb}`, :math:`La_{\rm SL}`, :math:`La_{\rm SLP}` and
enhancement factors are diagnosed from the Stokes drift and wind forcing.

.. automodule:: pygotm.stokes_drift
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

-------------------

.. automodule:: pygotm.stokes_drift.stokes_drift_exp
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

-------------------
